name: Nickolas Alden
description:
OC | 𝙇𝙮𝙘𝙖𝙣-𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙨𝙚 | ALTERNATE - Deep in the forest of Elennir during a hunting trip, King Nickolas Alden stumbles upon an injured Lycan, fending off brutal slave traders. In a heartbeat, his arrow is notched, not for the prey he sought but to help the Lycan he found he couldn't leave behind.

*---///---*
~ Demi-Human USER

*A part of my Lycan-verse series. Check out the (Setting=) paragraph in the character description for more info on the world. Also check out my other Bots in this universe!*
creator: Nallak
